---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Ka
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem This Solves
Describe the problem or limitation this feature would address.

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this feature working.

### Example Usage
```bash
# Show how users would use this feature
ka example-command
```

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
- **Is this feature related to a specific command?** [e.g., space, ram, copy]
- **Would this benefit many users?** [Yes/No/Maybe]
- **Can this be implemented as a custom command?** [Yes/No]

## Implementation Ideas
If you have technical ideas on how to implement this, share them here.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched for existing feature requests
- [ ] This feature is not already possible with custom commands
- [ ] I have provided clear examples of how this would work
